title: sales-stage-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the sales-stage-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: `prod` Required column: 'yes for audit'.

business_motion.description: Example from AGENT.md: `"new-logo enterprise SaaS"` Required column: 'yes for design'.

avg_cycle_length_days.description: Example from AGENT.md: `120` Required column: 'yes for design'.
